creator: arved@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Konstantin, 
Thanks for submitting the update. The port was updated. 

Alexander,  
I am sorry for my mistake, i did not notice that the script notifing the 
maintainer did notify you only 2 weeks later.  

I have merged your patch into the port. I hope everything is okay now. 
If not, please contact me.
